Pocket Sized Mag of Holding.Description:
A strangely shaped container that holds far more ammo than it should
Despite looking like a regular magazine, it refuses to fit into any weapon
Some SCAV found it buried in a stash, thinking he scored the ultimate high-capacity mag
When he tried to use it, the rounds simply vanished instead of feeding into the chamber
Frustrated, he tossed it aside-only to realize later that it still worked as a magazine, just not in the way he expected
It became the go-to pouch for stashing extra ammo
